chief_complaint: A 15-year-old girl presented with severe liver injury and mononucleosis caused by Epstein-Barr virus infection.
history: The patient developed severe liver injury and mononucleosis after methimazole treatment for Graves' disease, which eventually induced thyroid storm.
exam: Vital signs: not provided. Physical examination findings: not provided.
labs: ECG: not provided. Bloods: liver enzymes elevated. Imaging: not provided. Other tests: Epstein-Barr virus infection confirmed.
